task_completion.description: Rename the existing opportunity to the Design Phase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo CRM, the opportunity name field should display 'Azure Interior - Design Phase'.

task_completion.description: Update the expected revenue for the Design Phase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expected Revenue' field for the 'Azure Interior - Design Phase' opportunity should be set to $20,000.

task_completion.description: Set the closing date for the Design Phase to the end of the current month.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expected Closing' date field for the Design Phase opportunity should show a date corresponding to the last day of the current month.

task_completion.description: Create a new opportunity for the Implementation Phase with the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new opportunity form or card exists with the title 'Azure Interior - Implementation Phase' and the Customer field is set to 'Azure Interior'.

task_completion.description: Set the expected revenue for the Implementation Phase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expected Revenue' field for the 'Azure Interior - Implementation Phase' opportunity should be set to $100,000.

task_completion.description: Set the closing date for the Implementation Phase to approximately three months from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expected Closing' date field for the Implementation Phase opportunity should show a date approximately three months in the future.

task_completion.description: Ensure both opportunities are saved and visible in the pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM pipeline (Kanban view or list view) displays both 'Azure Interior - Design Phase' and 'Azure Interior - Implementation Phase' as distinct opportunities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo CRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should be on the correct local or remote Odoo URL, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database or backend manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a database client (like psql) or python shell to directly insert the opportunity records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: 'Azure Interior'. Phase 1 Name: 'Azure Interior - Design Phase' with Expected Revenue: 20000. Phase 2 Name: 'Azure Interior - Implementation Phase' with Expected Revenue: 100000. The VLM should verify these exact names and revenue amounts in the Odoo CRM interface.
